headlines.title: EU to hold migration meeting with Taliban officials in Brussels

headlines.snippet: Hillel Neuer, executive director of UN Watch, detailed his organization's efforts to lobby the US to sanction UN Special Rapporteur Francesca Albanese. Albanese is targeted due to remarks about the "Jewish lobby" and comments regarding the 7 October attacks.

headlines.title: Morning update
headlines.snippet: The United States and Iran have made progress on sanctions relief, nuclear inspections, and the release of frozen Iranian assets following talks in Switzerland. Disagreements persist regarding fund usage and tensions in Lebanon.

headlines.title: Iranian president says effectiveness of talks depends on commitment to obligations
headlines.snippet: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian stated that the effectiveness of negotiations with Washington hinges on the full and precise implementation of agreed-upon obligations. He emphasized that practical adherence to responsibilities, not external statements, will advance the talks.

headlines.title: Channel 13 reports curbs on Israeli army movements in Lebanon
headlines.snippet: Israeli Channel 13 reports that political leadership has imposed new limitations on military operations in southern Lebanon, restricting actions to direct threats within the "yellow line" and prohibiting operations in Beirut and Tyre. This reflects US pressure.
